# 👋 Hello World!

## About me

After an unconventional professional journey, I joined [Holberton School](https://www.holbertonschool.fr/) in Toulouse, where I completed an intensive training program, followed by a work-study experience as a Software Engineer.

Even before the end of my training, I was offered a full-time position, allowing me to continue in this role on the Dijon campus.

This experience enabled me to build strong technical foundations while also developing my adaptability, problem-solving skills, and ability to support others.

Today, I continue to grow by contributing to real-world projects while helping others progress in their own journeys.
